# Resistiumetry

**Summary**: Measuring the ability of a material to resist the flow of electric current.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2014-wajheeuddin|Wajheeuddin, 2014]] used resistiumetry to measure the resistivity of mud cake and filtrate after adding date seeds.

## Key Results and Findings

- Addition of date seeds lowers the resistivity of the mud cake as well as the mud filtrate. ([[2014-wajheeuddin|Wajheeuddin, 2014, p. 85]])
